raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute with American Express concerning a Hertz transaction in the amount of {$780.00}. I provided substantial evidence demonstrating that the contractual rental charge was {$190.00}. American Express denied the dispute despite the supporting documentation and failed to adequately investigate or resolve the billing error. I dispute the outcome and believe American Express did not fulfill its obligations under applicable consumer protection standards. As a result, I am submitting this complaint and will consider further legal remedies if necessary.
